Existing test user: atakan0909xxnxx@gmail.com / aaaaaa

Auth flow: 
1. POST http://localhost:4174/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password with {"email":"atakan0909xxnxx@gmail.com","password":"aaaaaa"}
2. Use the returned access_token as Bearer token for authenticated requests: Authorization: Bearer {access_token}

For signup tests, use a random unique email like test_TIMESTAMP@example.com to avoid conflicts.

For REST API calls, Supabase PostgREST requires:
- Prefer: return=representation (for INSERT/UPDATE to return data)
- For filtering: use query params like ?id=eq.{id}

Do NOT use Supabase JS client library - use raw fetch/axios/http calls directly to the proxy endpoints.
